title: Atomberg Intellon Adaptive Water Purifier (RO+UF+UV+Alkaliser, 8L, Smart IoT)
short_description: Smart 8L water purifier with adaptive RO+UF+UV filtration, IoT control, and 2-year zero maintenance cost.
long_description:
The Atomberg Intellon Water Purifier is one of India’s first adaptive purification systems designed to intelligently adjust filtration based on water quality. It features RO, UF, and UV purification combined with an alkaliser to retain essential minerals and maintain balanced pH levels.

With its Intelligent Filtration System (IFS), the purifier automatically detects input TDS levels and switches between purification modes, ensuring optimal performance and longer filter life. It avoids unnecessary RO usage, helping preserve minerals and reduce water wastage.

The purifier also comes with smart IoT features via the Atomberg Home App, allowing users to monitor filter health, control purification modes, and track usage. Its 7-stage purification ensures safe and clean drinking water for households.

With a 2-year comprehensive warranty and zero maintenance cost during that period, it stands out as a premium yet value-for-money smart water purifier.
cons: Depends on app for full features

positive: Great smart features and app control
Value for money with zero maintenance

seo.meta_title: Atomberg Intellon Water Purifier Review 2026 | Smart RO+UF+UV System
seo.meta_description: Buy Atomberg Intellon Water Purifier with adaptive filtration, IoT control, and 2-year warranty. Best smart water purifier in India.
